title: Why does one employee have a small black and white cloud icon next to their photo?
excerpt: One user has a small black circle with a white cloud in it next in the bottom left hand corner of their profile pic whenever you assign them to an item or when viewing their account in the admin screen. What does it mean…

posts.author: oboothhowe (Olivia Booth-Howe)
posts.cookedHtml:
One user has a small black circle with a white cloud in it next in the bottom left hand corner of their profile pic whenever you assign them to an item or when viewing their account in the admin screen. What does it mean? The email address associated with the account is the regular company email and the account has full member access.

Thank you in advance!

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @oboothhowe

Thanks for posting!

The icon you’re seeing refers to the users Working Status .
This allows you to easily see if your team member is taking a break or working from home.

You can set this via the profile picture in the bottom left hand corner:

image1552×456 69 KB

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani
